static.name: Static
static.description: When hit by a contact move, 30% chance to paralyze the attacker.

blaze.name: Blaze
blaze.description: Fire-type moves deal 1.5x damage when HP is below 1/3.

torrent.name: Torrent
torrent.description: Water-type moves deal 1.5x damage when HP is below 1/3.

overgrow.name: Overgrow
overgrow.description: Grass-type moves deal 1.5x damage when HP is below 1/3.

cursed-body.name: Cursed Body
cursed-body.description: When hit by a move, 30% chance to disable that move.
